morning.label: What's on your mind right now?
morning.hint: No filter. Whatever is sitting at the top. Get it out before you start.

morning.label: Three things I'm grateful for
morning.hint: Concrete. A moment, a person, a texture — not an abstraction.

morning.label: What would make today great
morning.hint: Three things. Small enough to do, sharp enough to matter.

morning.label: Daily affirmation
morning.hint: One sentence. Written in the present tense. Should sting slightly if read on a coasting day.

evening.label: Three amazing things that happened today
evening.hint: Even the tiny ones. Especially the tiny ones.

evening.label: How could I have made today better
evening.hint: Not self-punishment. Surgical. One gap, specific, closeable.
